The continent is almost . 9 . g n i t e e m e h t f o s e t u n i m e h t f o l a v o r p p A predestined to enjoy a long period of mid-to-high economic growth, rising incomes, and an emerging middle class. Several international . B . N business observers have also named Africa as the future economic growth engine of the world. d n a n g i s o t n o s r e p n i r a e p p a y a m g n i t e e m e h t t a n o s r e p n i d n e t t a o t e l b a t o n e r a o h w s r e d l o h e r a h S There are positive longer-term trends across Africa all buoyed by what appeared to be high economic growth rates sweeping the continent. Ethiopian Re, as the youngest reinsurance company stands to benefit immensely from the unprecedented business opportunities brought about by the bourgeoning economic performance of Africa, and hence the motto “Rising with Africa”. Basing itself in . y East t i r o h t Africa, u a t n e m the n r e v o g e v i t c e p s e r Company is committed to providing apposite reinsurance cover for the ever-rising and dynamic demand for protection.

24/25 /24 WHO WE ARE MISSION, VISION AND CORE VALUES Mission Provide dependable reinsurance services both locally and internationally through nurturing adequate risk capacity and using highly trained professionals and modern Information and Communication Technology systems. The Company endeavours to foster market stability, high professionalism, and advancing the business of insurance paying special attention to discharging its corporate social responsibility in the process. Vision “To be the reinsurer of choice in Ethiopia and our chosen market” Core Values To apprehend our corporate mission and vision, the Management and staff of Ethiopian Re stand for the mnemonic “ETHIOPIAN”:
Innovation Ally and close Technology and Professionalism partnerships reliant learning with customers
Excellence Honesty Openness and Innovation National Icon in service transparency and learning 2

Ethio-Re assures that the rating was one of the “Big Five Pillars” of the newly designed strategic plan “Vision 2030”, and as per its time scale. we have got rating from AM Best rating agency of Financial Strength B (Fair) get and Long Term bb (Fair) with Stable outlook.

Training & Market Development At Ethiopian Reinsurance S.C. (Ethio-Re), we believe that a strong insurance market begins with knowledge. We have delivered over 18 specialized training programs in last financial year 2024/25 and continue to host monthly at least one capacity-building sessions for market participants. Our commitment: to empower the industry through continuous learning and professional development.

Strategic Partnerships Ethio-Re works hand-in-hand with key stakeholders to shape a resilient and forward-looking insurance ecosystem. We maintain strong partnerships with: • Local and international reinsurance companies • Regulatory authorities • Market-leading insurance firms Together, we drive innovation, compliance, and sustainable growth across the sector.

24/25 /24 Ethio-Re’s Environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles: Ethio-Re has joined the Nairobi Declaration on Sustainable Insurance and become the signatory member effective 2024. Accordingly, the company is striving to integrating sustainable insurance principles into its business operations. The company has a plan and ambition to become an African ESG champion and industry leader and not only by taking meaningful ESG action in its own businesses, but also want to become a forefront runner and advocate for sustainable practices, influencing the sector at large. Hence, Ethio-Re has a robust commitment to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles at the Ethiopian, continental and regional level, have a willingness to allocate its own resources to sustainable projects, and become active participant in the Nairobi Declaration on Sustainable Insurance. Capital structure The legal minimum paid up capital to establish a reinsurance company in Ethiopia is Birr 500,000,000 (Birr Five Hundred Million) equivalent to USD$ 10 million. The subscribed capital of Ethiopian Re is Birr 2.5 Billion equivalent to USD 50 million which by any standard is huge for a company just started operation. UNDERWRITING CAPACITY As a foremost reinsurer in the domestic reinsurance market, Ethio-Re provides reinsurance to the direct long term and general insurance companies in the Ethiopian market. However, grounded on its business strategy, Ethio- Re spreads its wings to transpire as an active reinsurance solutions partner for the African and selected Asian markets. Hence, as depicted in the table below, Ethio-Re provides the following capacities for Treaty and Facultative businesses on risks emanating from the targeted local and international markets based on merits of the business from its clientele.
Class of Business Treaty Capacity(USD) Facultative Capacity(USD)

Geographical scope Ethio Re would strive to secure business from domestic and international markets. In the short term however it primarily focuses on building strong market base in Ethiopia and Sub Shaharan Africa although Ethiopia will remain the major source of the Company’s business in the foreseeable future. However, the Company has a well thought plan to expand its reach to international markets with special focus on accepting business from African, Middle East and Asian markets on selective basis.
